Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 20/12/2025
The market showed a marginal improvement during the week, though buying activity remained slow as fast USD/INR movements continued

[Page 2]
MARKET SUMMARY
INDIA
The market showed a marginal improvement during the week, though buying activity
remained slow as fast USD/INR movements continued to affect sentiment and limit
pricing confidence. Developments surrounding Venezuela added to uncertainty, as tighter enforcement
on sanctioned oil movements raised questions over tanker demand, charter rates, and
the potential impact on global tonnage availability. With limited clarity on how these factors may evolve, overall sentiment remained
